column2: Wardin, Belgium, December 19th, 1944. Company I of the 501st encounters the 901st Panzer Regiment entering Wardin from the south, turning what should have been a meeting engagement into an ambush.
The German player wins immediately if he controls all of the stone buildings on board 1.
All Allied units enter on the West edge of board 1 or hexes A8 or A9 of the North edge on game turn 1.
All German units enter the South edge of board 6 on game turn 1.
